title: Tax offsets in your supplementary tax return 2024
description: Complete question T if you had tax offsets in the supplementary section in your tax return.
keywords: Individual tax return instructions, tax offsets, supplementary, tax return 2024, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: You need to complete Supplementary tax return for individuals 2024, if you were entitled to any of the following tax offsets:

items: superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse
living in a remote or isolated area of Australia
serving overseas as a member of the Australian Defence Force or a United Nations armed force
maintenance of an invalid or an invalid carer who is 16 years old or older
landcare and water facility tax offset brought forward from an earlier year
foreign income tax offset, which you claimed at question 20
tax paid by the trustee of a special disability trust if you were the principal beneficiary

content_blocks.text: If you weren’t entitled to any of the above tax offsets, see Where to go next .
What you need to answer this question
You can get a copy of the Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2024 . You may also need to read Supplementary tax return instructions 2024 .

After completing all details that are relevant to your circumstances in the Supplementary tax return for individuals 2024, transfer the Total supplement tax offsets amount to the Tax offsets section in your tax return – question T .

items: Go to question Total tax offsets 2024 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
Go back to question T2 Australian superannuation income stream 2024 .

content_text:
## Things you need to know
You need to complete Supplementary tax return for individuals 2024, if you were entitled to any of the following tax offsets:
- superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse
- living in a remote or isolated area of Australia
- serving overseas as a member of the Australian Defence Force or a United Nations armed force
- maintenance of an invalid or an invalid carer who is 16 years old or older
- landcare and water facility tax offset brought forward from an earlier year
- early-stage venture capital limited partnership
- early-stage investor
- foreign income tax offset, which you claimed at question 20
- tax paid by the trustee of a special disability trust if you were the principal beneficiary
- exploration credits.
If you weren’t entitled to any of the above tax offsets, see Where to go next .
## What you need to answer this question
You can get a copy of the Tax return for individuals (supplementary section) 2024 . You may also need to read Supplementary tax return instructions 2024 .
## Completing your tax return
After completing all details that are relevant to your circumstances in the Supplementary tax return for individuals 2024, transfer the Total supplement tax offsets amount to the Tax offsets section in your tax return – question T .
## Where to go next
- Go to question Total tax offsets 2024 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
- Go back to question T2 Australian superannuation income stream 2024 .
